channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Is that carb ultra-processed? Here's a test even a kid can do
item.description: The latest nutrition guidelines urge Americans to avoid highly processed food. But when it comes to carbs, many people don't know which ones are ultra...

item.title: This Antioxidant âWakes Up The Brainâ Similar To Exercise
item.description: The astringent sensation caused by flavanols could act as a direct signal to the brain, triggering effects similar to a mild workout.

item.title: 7 Science-Backed Ways to Lower Your Blood Pressure Naturally
item.description: No 2. on the list is crucial.

item.title: The Science-Backed Morning Habit You're Missing â It Takes Only 5 Minutes
item.description: Plus, it's quick, free, and incredibly effective.

item.title: How to Support Your Heart Health With 2 Simple Nightly Steps
item.description: According to a new study, it's not what you eat but when.

item.title: Photos: The flying doctors of Lesotho won't let their wings be clipped
item.description: This band of airborne health workers bring essential medical care to isolated communities in the southern African nation. In addition to turbulence, t...

item.title: Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit
What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low
7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: What the FDA's rejection of Moderna's flu shot means for the future of vaccines
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration rejected Moderna's new flu shot. This raises questions about what it means for the future of vaccine development.

item.title: 6 Comforting Soup Recipes That Can Help Support Your Immune System
item.description: For those chilly days when a bowl of soup is all you want.

item.title: It's a dangerous complication of pregnancy -- but a new drug holds promise
item.description: Researchers celebrate early results of a drug that may become the first treatment for a serious complication of pregnancy called preeclampsia. It's go...

item.title: Dr. Oz pushes AI avatars as a fix for rural health care. Not so fast, critics say
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, who heads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, is advancing a $50 billion plan to modernize rural health care.
